books.title: Ahkam-e-Eidain by Maulana Ashraf Ali Thanvi
books.author: Maulana Ashraf Ali Thanvi
books.description: The book Ahkam-e-Eidain is a collection of essential Sharia rulings, etiquette, and corrective instructions related to Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha, presented in a very short, simple manner. This book presents guidance from the writings, sermons, and other works of Hakim al-Ummat Maulana Ashraf Ali Thanvi on the issues, Sunnahs, and practical aspects of the two Eids.

books.title: Ramazan ul Mubarak Masail o Fazail By Maulana Dr Muhammad Mushtaq Ahmad
Mobile Phone kay Zariya Nikah o Talaq By Maulana Shabbir Ahmad Usmani
Tamreen ul Mantiq By Mufti Muhammad Husamuddin Qasmi
Tareekh e Quran By Maulana Qari Shareef Ahmad
books.description: Tareekh e Quran is an authentic, comprehensive and high-level work by Hazrat Maulana Qari Shareef Ahmad Sahib, in which the history of the Holy Quran, its authenticity and various aspects of its preservation are presented in a very researched and easy-to-understand manner. The new addition to this book includes the scholarly efforts of Hafiz Tanveer Ahmed Sahib Sharifi, which have further enhanced the usefulness and comprehensiveness of this work.

books.title: Khushgawar Azdawaji Zindagi Ke Rahnuma Usool By Mufti Abdul Latif Qasmi
books.description: Khushgawar Azdawaji Zindagi Ke Rahnuma Usool By Mufti Abdul Latif Qasmi. This book provides a comprehensive and educational guide to making the pure relationship of marriage strong, purposeful, and happy. The author, Mufti Abdul Latif Qasmi, has summarised the important aspects of married life on which the foundation of a family is built.

books.title: Ghair Muslim Ke Sath Mukhtalif Noiyat Ke Taluqat By Mufti Ubaid ur Rahman
books.description: Ghair Muslim Ke Sath Mukhtalif Noiyat Ke Taluqat By Mufti Ubaid ur Rahman. This book is about the mutual relations between Muslims and non-Muslims. Such relations sometimes take the form of neighbourliness and friendship, sometimes come in the form of economic and social cooperation, and sometimes in the form of cultural influences and new challenges. How far is there room in these relations? At what points is caution required? And what are the correct limits of these relations from a Sharia poi

books.title: Namaz e Fajr ki Ahmiyat By Mufti Ahmadullah Nisar
books.description: Namaz e Fajr ki Ahmiyat Aur Sunnat e Fajr Ke Ahkam, written by Mufti Ahmadullah Nisar Qasmi Naqshbandi Mujaddidi. This book discusses the Importance of Fajr Prayer and the Rules of Fajr Sunnah in Urdu. It is an important and scholarly effort in which the virtues of Fajr prayer, its times, and especially the Shariah rules of Fajr Sunnah are explained in detail.

books.title: Guldasta e Ahadith By Mufti Muhammad Shafiq Shah
books.description: “Guldasta Hadith” is a grand and comprehensive compilation by Mufti Muhammad Shafiq Shahbhai Bardavi, in which the blessed Ahadith of the Holy Prophet (PBUH) are presented in a very attractive, evocative and influential manner. This book aims to leave an indelible mark on the heart and mind of the reader and to revolutionize their practical life.
categories: Mufti Muhammad Shafiq Shah Bhai Barodvi

books.title: Zikar Ki Taseer Aur Zikar Ke 73 Fawaid by Mufti Muhammad Ikramuddin
books.description: The book Zikar Ke Taseer Aur Zikar Ke 73 Fawaid (The Effect of Dhikr and 73 Benefits of Dhikr) is a spiritual and reformative booklet compiled by Hazrat Maulana Mufti Muhammad Ikramuddin Sahib, Patwardi Sam Randeri, Ustaaz Al-Hadith, at Darul Uloom Ashrafiya, Randhir, Surat, Gujarat. The main purpose of writing this book is to increase the passion for Dhikr of Allah in the hearts of Zakireen and seekers of the path and to further ignite the fire of love for Allah.

books.title: Akhlaq e Nabvi by Maulana Muhammad Ishaq Multani
books.description: Akhlaq e Nabvi Yani Rawiye Hamare Huzoor Ke, written by Maulana Muhammad Ishaq Sahib Multani. This book is a bouquet of bright aspects of the noble and pure ethics and character of the Holy Prophet Muhammad (PBUH), compiled by Maulana Muhammad Ishaq Sahib Multani. This book combines practical examples of good ethics and charming incidents taken from the entire life of the Holy Prophet (PBUH).

books.title: Allah Walon Ki Maqbooliyat Ka Raaz by Mufti Muhammad Salman Mansoor Puri
books.description: Allah Walon Ki Maqbooliyat Ka Raaz written by Mufti Muhammad Salman Mansoor Puri. This book sheds light on those aspects of the lives of the saints of Allah, the righteous and the religious leaders which are the real secret of their general popularity and high status.

books.title: Mukhtasar Aqaid e Islam by Maulana Muhammad Fazeel Qureshi Qasmi
books.description: Mukhtasar Aqaid e Islam, written by Maulana Muhammad Fazeel Qureshi Qasmi. A short book of Islamic beliefs in a very simple language and question-and-answer format for young Muslim children.

books.title: Tasheel Taiseer ul Mantiq by By Maulana Ayaz Muhammad
Aurad e Rahmani Aur Azkar e Subhani by Maulana Ashraf Ali Thanvi
books.description: Aurad e Rahmani Aur Azkar e Subhani Authored by Hakeem Ummat Hazrat Maulana Ashraf Ali Thanvi, may God bless him and grant him peace. This book contains the virtues of Tasbih, Tahmid, and Takbeer (Subhan Allah, Alhamdulillah, Allahu Akbar). It states that these three words are the essence of the 99 beautiful names of Allah. It is as if by reciting these short words, one can obtain the blessings, lights, and benefits of all the divine names and attributes.

books.title: Ifadat e Safdariya By Maulana Sarfaraz Khan Safdar
books.description: Ifadat e Safdariya By Maulana Sarfaraz Khan Safdar. This book is a collection of lectures by Sheikh ul Tafsir Wal Hadith Imam Ahl-e-Sunnah Maulana Muhammad Sarfaraz Khan Safdar Sahib (RA), which Sheikh Hadith Maulana Fazal Wahab Sahib recorded during his lectures in the “Dura e Tafseer” period. This collection of interpretations is very useful for scholars and students who want to teach interpretation and the Quran in madrasas.

books.title: Usul Al-Shashi by Nizam al-Din Shashi
books.description: The book Usul al-Shashi is a famous and well-known book of Islamic Jurisprudence. Scholars have been teaching this book for hundreds of years. The author of this book is unknown. Some scholars have written the author’s name as Nizam al-Din Shashi, while according to others, the author is Abu Yaqub Ishaq Ibn Ibrahim Al-Khorasani Al-Shashi. The author was a resident of Shash, a village in Khorasan. However, this information about the author cannot be definitively established.

books.title: 16 Line Tajweed Quran
books.description: 16 Line Tajweed Quran in PDF format. Reading this Qur’an will be quite interesting for anyone who can read the Quran and has some knowledge of Tajweed. Its four colours have made it amazingly simple for readers to follow Tajweed guidelines, and viewers will find it more captivating and beautiful due to the lovely colour combination.

books.title: Al Muallaqat Us Saba (The Seven Poems Suspended In The Masjid Al-Haram)
books.description: This book contains seven renowned and well-known Arabian poems. It is an exquisite work of Arab poetry. When readers read them, they startle. The poets mention new concepts, metaphors, similes, and meanings in it. The Al Muallaqat Us Saba are seven poems. Muallaq means hung, and these poems are so beautifully worded that they were hung inside the Souq Okaz.

books.title: Sharh E Tahzeeb By Abdullah Ibn Husayn Yazdi
books.description: Sharh E Tahzeeb book written By Abdullah Ibn Husayn Yazdi. It is a short book and has two parts. The first part is in logic(mantiq), and the second part discusses creed. The full name of this short book of Allama Taftazani is “Tahzeeb ul Mantiq Wal Kalam”. However, it is called “Tehzeeb” in short.

books.title: Sharh Ul Wiqayah By Sadr Al-Sharia Ubaydullah Ibn Masud
books.description: Sharh Ul Wiqayah By Ubaydullah Ibn Masud Ibn Ahmad. The fame of this writer’s book is from Allah. For centuries, Islamic scholars have been imparting knowledge using this book. Sharh Ul Wiqayah is an important text for Hanafi fiqh. Besides that, the author has written several other works. Essentially, this book is the Sharh of the text known as Wiqayah. Taj Al-Sharia Mahmood, the author’s grandpa, wrote the book’s text. The author also wrote the Niqayah, a summary of the Wiqayah text.

books.title: Al Hidayah By Burhan Al-Din Abu Al-Hasan Ali Ibn Abi Bakr Al-Farghani Al-Marghinani
books.description: Al Hidayah by Burhan al-Din Abu al-Hasan Ali Ibn Abi Bakr al-Farghani al-Marghinani is a great and unique masterpiece of Hanafi Fiqh (jurisprudence). It’s been said that Burhan al-Din Abu al-Hasan Ali Ibn Abi Bakr al-Farghani al-Marghinani spent 13 years writing this book.

books.title: Al Subhun Noori Urdu Sharah Al Mukhtasar Ul Quduri By Maulana Hanif Gangohi
books.description: Al Subhun Noori Urdu Sharah Al Mukhtasar Ul Quduri is a book written by Maulana Hanif Gangohi. It is an Urdu version of the Al Mukhtasar Ul Quduri, which does not need an introduction.

books.title: Tasheel Ul Adab By Shaykh Saleem Ullah Khan
books.description: The book Tasheel-ul-Adab is taught according to the curriculum of the Wifaq ul Madaris in Al Sania (2nd year). Tasheelul Adab is an Arabic word that, in English, means to simplify literature. It is teaching the Arabic language.

books.title: Irshad Un Nahw Urdu Sharh Hidayat Un Nahw By Maulana Irshad Ahmad
books.description: Irshad Un Nahw Urdu Sharh Hidayat Un Nahw By Maulana Irshad Ahmad. By penning this book, Maulana Irshad Ahmed has done a huge service to the pupils. This book will be very useful for weak male and female students and will also prove to be very useful for elementary teachers.

books.title: Tadrees E Quran By Maulana Hussain Ahmad Hardwari
books.description: Tadrees E Quran By Maulana Hussain Ahmad Hardwari. This is a book dear to the hearts of students. This book is free from weak sayings and opinions. The book is common sense for everyone. A short tafseer with valuable content and excellent points for intelligent students. The following features make the book extremely useful:

books.title: Taiseer Ul Mantiq By Maulana Abdullah Gangohi
books.description: “Taiseer-ul-Mantiq”, written by Maulana Abdullah Gangohi. It is a famous Islamic educational book on Mantiq (logic). It is widely studied in Islamic schools and academic institutions across Pakistan and India. This book makes the study of logic accessible and understandable to readers. Maulana Abdullah Gangohi has systematically organized this book, starting with basic concepts and affirmations and gradually moving toward more advanced topics.

books.title: Mukhtar Ut Talibeen Urdu Sharh Zad Ut Talibeen By Maulana Muhammad Akhtar
books.description: Mukhtar ut Talibeen is a short and comprehensive Sharah of the famous hadith book ‘Zad ut Talibeen’ included in the Dars e Nizami course. Maulana Muhammad Akhtar has arranged the correct pronunciation of words according to Arabic grammar in this book. The author has also described the Urdu translation of hadiths in the book. Also, the explanation of hadiths is very brief and easy, which is very useful for beginners.

books.title: Farsi Zaban Ka Asan Qaida By Mushtaq Ahmad Charthawli
books.description: Farsi Zaban Ka Asan Qaida By Maulana Mushtaq Ahmad Charthawli. If you want to learn a language you have never spoken in your life and you don’t even know how to speak it, first of all, you must understand its grammar.

books.title: Tohfa Isna Ashriya By Shah Abdul Aziz Urdu Translation
books.description: Tohfa Isna Ashriya by Shah Abdul Aziz Dehlavi, Urdu Translated By Maulana Khalil Ur Rahman Nomani. Tohfa Isna Ashriya is a unique and rare compilation of the 12th-century Hijri. For a complete understanding of the Shia religion, there is no book more comprehensive, complete, and authentic than the Tohfa Isna Ashria.
categories: Maulana Shah Abdul Aziz Muhaddis Dehlvi
books.primary_category: Maulana Shah Abdul Aziz Muhaddis Dehlvi

books.title: Dars E Asar Us Sunan By Mufti Faizan Ur Rahman Kamal
books.description: Dars E Asar Us Sunan By Mufti Faizan Ur Rahman Kamal. This book is an Urdu sharah on the book Aasar us Sunan by Allama Muhammad Bin Ali Al-Nimawi. Allama Muhammad Bin Ali Al-Nimawi has collected irrefutable arguments in the form of authentic hadiths on the evidence of Hanafi fiqh in the book ‘Aasaar us Sunan’. For a long time, there have been a series of sharahs in this book, but each sharah is either very detailed or so short that the explanation itself has become insufficient. Hence, there was

books.title: Kareema Mutarajjam Saadi By Sheikh Saadi
books.description: Kareema Mutarajjam Saadi, By Sheikh Saadi. Karima Saadi is the best book of Persian literature and advice. This book is available to you with an Urdu translation.

books.title: Pand Nama By Sheikh Fariduddin Attar
books.description: Pand Nama Persian By Sheikh Fariduddin Attar. Pand nama is a Persian word that means a letter in which good instructions have been written. In the olden days, if a person were on the path of Sufism when the seeker would meet his Shaykh, the Shaykh would write some advice and give it to him. That advice was called Pand Nama.

books.title: Anwaar Us Sarf By Maulana Muhammad Adnan Kalyanvi
books.description: Anwaar Us Sarf Urdu Sharah Irshad Us Sarf By Maulana Muhammad Adnan Kalyanvi. Anwaar Us Sarf is a thorough sharah of Irshad Us Sarf that has beautifully resolved a challenging book like Irshad Us Sarf.

books.title: Tauzeeh ul Aqaid By Maulana Ikram Ul Haq
books.description: The book of Ilm ul Kalam, Sharh Ul Aqaid Un Nasafiyah, has an extraordinary reputation under the curriculum of Wifaq ul Madaris. This book is a comprehensive and simple Urdu Sharah of Sharh Ul Aqaid Un Nasafiyah. The following are some of the salient features of the book Tauzeeh ul Aqaid.

books.title: Khair Ul Usool By Maulana Khair Muhammad Jalandhari
books.description: Khair Ul Usool book, written By Maulana Khair Muhammad Jalandhari. This book describes several kinds of hadith and clearly explains any challenging terminology found in Usool E Hadith.

books.title: Raozat Us Saliheen Urdu Sharah Riaz Us Saliheen By Maulana Muhammad Hussain Siddiqui
books.description: Raozat Us Saliheen Urdu Sharah Riaz Us Saliheen By Maulana Muhammad Hussain Siddiqui. Imam Nawawi’s popular book Riaz Us Saliheen’s comprehensive and reasoned sharah in the Urdu language for the first time. The main features of this book are as follows:

books.title: Ramzan Aur Jadeed Masail By Maulana Mufti Muhammad Shoaibullah Khan
books.description: Ramzan Aur Jadeed Masail By Maulana Mufti Muhammad Shoaibullah Khan. Ramazan Aur Jadeed Masail is a useful, effective, and research-oriented book on its subject. It collects significant and useful issues and deserves to be in every home.

books.title: Sharh E Mulla Jami By Abdul Rahman Bin Ahmad Al Jami
books.description: Sharh E Mulla Jami By Abdul Rahman Bin Ahmad Al Jami. The highest level Nahw book, according to the Wifaq ul Madaris curriculum, is Sharh e Jami. Sharh e Jami is the Sharh of Allama Ibne Hajib’s famous book Kafia.

books.title: Nahw Meer Urdu By Nazir Hussain Ibn Usman
books.description: Nahw Meer Urdu By Nazir Hussain Ibn Usman Hathorvi. The original text of Nahw Meer is in the Persian language. This book is an Urdu edition of Nahw Meer with some important additions, which is why it is named Nahaw Meer Urdu.

books.title: Noor Ul Izah Arabic By Al Sheikh Hassan Bin Ali Al Shurunbulali
books.description: Noor Ul Izah Arabic By Al Sheikh Hassan Bin Ali Al Shurunbulali. This is a book of Islamic jurisprudence in the Arabic language. This book is taught in the first class of Dars e Nizami.

books.title: Zad Ul Talibeen By Allama Ashiq Ilahi Al Barni
books.description: Allama Ashiq Ilahi Barni wrote a little hadith book titled Zaad ul Talibeen. This book contains 329 hadiths. The term “Hadith” is used by scholars to describe the sayings and acts of Prophet Muhammad (PBUH). Thus Hadith knowledge has been given importance. From the prophetic viewpoint, the prophet Muhammad (PBUH) is the subject of hadith.

books.title: Al Mukhtasar Ul Quduri
books.description: Al Mukhtasar Ul Quduri By Abul Hussain Al Imam Ahmad Bin Muhammad. Abul Hussain is the surname of the author, while Ahmad is his name. He is popularly known as Imam Quduri. The author has discussed twelve thousand fiqh problems in this book.

books.title: Al Fiqh Ul Muyassar Urdu By Muhammad Azhar Ul Islam
books.description: Al-Fiqh Ul Muyassar is an elementary textbook of Islamic Legal Jurisprudence written by Maulana Shafiqur Rahman Sahib Nadwi. It is taught in Islamic schools. The Urdu translation of this book was very important for the benefit of all people. We are very grateful to Allah that Maulana Muhammad Azhar ul Islam Muzaffarpuri did this important work.

books.title: Al Tariqatul Asria Vol 1 By Dr.Abdul Razzaq Iskander
books.description: Al Tariqatul Asria Vol 1 By Dr.Abdul Razzaq Iskander. The book is easy and meant for those who want to study the Arabic language while speaking Urdu language. For those who speak Urdu and wish to learn Arabic, this is the best book you will ever come across. In a beautiful yet simple manner, everyday things and sentences have been translated into Arabic through this book.

books.title: Dars E Nizami Ki Kitabain Kaise Parhen Aor Parain By Mufti Muhammad Taqi Usmani
books.description: Dars E Nizami Ki Kitabain Kaise Parhen Aor Parain By Mufti Muhammad Taqi Usmani. The importance of Dars e Nizami in Islamic schools (madrassas) is not hidden from anyone. In the atmosphere of Islamic madrassas, successful teachers are those who can teach these books properly. Many experiments have been done in teaching methods, and it has been worked on Dars e Nizami in every era.

books.title: Ambar Ul Yam Urdu Tafseer Para Amm
books.description: Ambar Ul Yam Urdu Tafseer Para Amm written by Maulana Abdur Rehman Jami . Ambar ul Yam is an exegesis on the last Para of the Holy Quran. It was specially written for the students of Dars e Nizami. Its vocabulary solutions, exegetic points, smooth translation, and composition solutions have made it useful for scholars and students.
categories: Wonders of the Holy Quran in Urdu

books.title: Miftah Ul Awamil Urdu Sharh Sharh Miata Aamil By Maulana Fakhr Uddin Ahmad Muradabadi
books.description: Miftah Ul Awamil Urdu Sharh Sharh Miata Aamil By Maulana Fakhr Uddin Ahmad Muradabadi. This book contains different types of combinations of Sharh Miata Aamil’s text. These combinations are called “Tarkeeb” in the parlance of students and teachers. Along with the interpretation of the text, easy ways to solve Arabic phrases are also mentioned in this book (Miftah ul Awamil). This book is very beneficial for both teachers and students.

books.title: Ilm Us Sarf Aowalain And Ilm Us Sarf Aakherain By Maulana Mushtaq Ahmad Charthawli.
books.description: Ilm Us Sarf Aowalain And Ilm Us Sarf Aakherain by Maulana Mushtaq Ahmad Charthawli. Ilm Us Sarf is a simple and commonly understood book of Sarf (Etymology). Learning Al-Sarf is intended to avoid incorrect pronunciation of Arabic expressions.

books.title: Halaat E Musannifeen E Dars E Nizami By Maulana Hanif Gangohi
books.description: Halaat E Musannifeen E Dars E Nizami is a book by Maulana Hanif Gangohi that documents the biographies and live events of the authors of Dars e Nizami books.

books.title: Abwab Us Sarf Jadeed By Maulana Khawaja Khuda Bakhsh Multani
books.description: Abwab Us Sarf Jadeed By Maulana Khawaja Khuda Bakhsh Multani. If you also want to memorise all phrases (گردانیں) of Ilm e Sarf, then you will not find a better book than this. Arabic literature becomes quite easy after memorising this book. The purpose of memorising this book for the students of Islamic schools is to understand the Quran and Hadith, as well as the major books of Arabic.

books.title: Sharh Miata Amil By Sheikh Imam Abdul Qahir Jurjani
books.description: Sharh Miata Amil By Sheikh Imam Abdul Qahir Jurjani. The best book of Ilm e Nahw taught in Islamic schools is Sharh Miata Aamil. Students in Darja Al-Aula (1st year of Dars e Nizami) are taught this book using a specific approach. In their vocabulary, this specific technique is referred to as take. It is imperative that students of Darja Al-Aula (1st year) study this book, as it is quite helpful.

books.title: Irshad Us Sarf Persian By Maulana Abdul Kareem
books.description: Irshad Us Sarf Persian By Maulana Abdul Kareem. Irshad Us Sarf is a very important book included in the Dars e Nizami syllabus. Ilm e Sarf can be mastered only by understanding and memorising it well. Although the volume of this book is small, it is a very comprehensive book in Ilm e Sarf, and a common person can’t understand it without an expert teacher.

books.title: Nahw Meer Persian By Mir Sayyid Sharif Abu Al Hassan Ali Bin Muhammad
books.description: Nahw Meer Persian By Mir Sayyid Sharif Abu Al Hassan Ali Bin Muhammad. Nahw Meer is the best book taught in Islamic madrassas to understand the basic Arabic language. This book is written in the Persian language. If you don’t understand the Persian language, then it is better to read Ilm un Nahaw instead of this book. It is also for learning basic Arabic, but it is written in Urdu.

books.title: Takmeel Ul Izah Urdu Sharh Noor Ul Izah By Maulana Abul Kalam Waseem
books.description: Takmeel Ul Izah Urdu Sharh Noor Ul Izah authored by Maulana Hasan bin Ali. This book has been in existence for around 412 years, making it a priceless gem of knowledge in Islamic law. Despite being ancient, it still remains indispensable; hence, it is used as a textbook for beginners.

books.title: Ilm un Nahw by Maulana Mushtaq Ahmad Charthawli
books.description: Ilm un Nahw by Maulana Mushtaq Ahmad Charthawli. This is the best and easiest book to learn the Arabic language. The Quran and Hadith are in Arabic, so reading this book is very important for understanding them. It is included in the Dars-e-Nizami course for the first year.

books.title: Lawrence Of Arabia Urdu By Qazi Musheer Uddin
books.description: “Lawrence of Arabia Urdu,” (لارنس آف عربیہ) written by Edward Robinson and translated by Qazi Musheer Uddin. This book contains the story of Colonel Lawrence in Urdu language. It’s about a British spy during World War I in the Middle Eas

books.title: Suche Moti Jaise Log Novel By Riffat Siraj
books.description: Suche Moti Jaise Log Novel By Riffat Siraj. This novel contains a captivating story about relationships and love. Riffat Siraj, a famous female writer, tells a tale that explores the importance of people in our lives. The book has engaging characters and contains important life lessons.

books.title: Darakhshan Novel by Anwar Siddiqui
books.description: Darakhshan Novel Complete written by Anwar Siddiqui. This novel contains an interesting horror, suspense, and action that keeps you hooked from start to finish. This novel is first published episode-wise in a monthly digest. It was a crowd favourite for its gripping storyline.

books.title: Teer e Nigah Novel by M Aslam
books.description: Teer e Nigah novel written by M Aslam. It is a heart-touching story about a young man facing tough luck. He inherits a fortune but loses it all to his uncle, and to make things worse, he loses his girlfriend in the midst of this hardship.

books.title: 110 Mujarab Istikhare by Muhammad Ayaz Muzmal Hussain Shah
books.description: 110 Mujarab Istikhare, authored by Muhammad Ayaz Muzmal Hussain Shah. This book is a comprehensive guide that delves into the mystical practice of Istikhara, offering invaluable insights into this age-old tradition. This book is your key to unlocking the secrets of important life decisions, from engagements to marriages and starting a business, through using the lucky number Istikharas.

books.title: Yak Na Shud Novel by Malik Safdar Hayat
books.description: Yak Na Shud Novel by Malik Safdar Hayat. This Urdu novel contains powerful crime and investigation stories. It gives us an idea of what the world of law enforcement is like and how complicated criminals’ brains are.

books.title: Hum Kaise Rakhwale Hain Novel by Nabeela Aziz
books.description: Hum Kaise Rakhwale Hain by Nabeela Aziz. The story is a wonderful exploration of social issues and love matters, so it makes you begin questioning what is there in our society.

books.title: Mom Novel by M.A Rahat
books.description: “Mom Novel” written by MA Rahat. This novel contains a collection of three diversified tales revolving around social intricacies, love, and calls for societal transformation. It sheds light on some challenges faced by people, with emphasis on how impactful relationships are in ensuring their pursuit of happy lives.

books.title: Jeevan Sathi Novel by Nasir Hussain
books.description: Jeevan Sathi Novel by Nasir Hussain. This novel contains a compelling story of love, desire, and the complexities of human emotions. This work takes readers on a rollercoaster ride through the lives of a guy divided between two women, set against a backdrop of social rules and emotional entanglements.

books.title: Janan Tujhe Jab Jana Novel by Neelam Riasat
books.description: Janan Tujhe Jab Jana Novel, written by Neelam Riasat. This book is an interesting story that addresses social problems in depth yet entwines it with complicated elements of love. The novel, published in parts in a magazine, provides an intense examination of family relations and the fight for women’s rights in our world.

books.title: Nasir e Rasool Book By Syed Yaqoob Haidri
books.description: Nasir e Rasool book, written by Syed Yaqub Haidari. This book presents Hazrat Abu Talib’s life in a unique manner by not only detailing his own achievements but also giving an account of the early proponents of Islam. The writer neither makes mention of the faith of Hazrat Abu Talib nor depends on any other source apart from citing from the Holy Quran.

books.title: Rim Jhim Poetry Book by Ahmad Nadeem Qasmi
books.description: Rim Jhim Urdu poetry book written by Ahmad Nadeem Qasmi. This book contains a collection of Urdu poems highlighting the complexities of human emotions and experiences. Through an extraordinary vocabulary, Qasmi composes lines that are touching in a direct way. The book demonstrates his prowess in writing, journalism, poetry and criticism and hence serves as a testimonial to the extent of his excellence in all four areas within his vernacular language, Urdu.

books.title: Ba Kamal Waqiat By Mufti Ghulam Hassan
books.description: Ba Kamal Waqiat written by Mufti Ghulam Hassan Qadri. This book describes the most famous and remarkable events of Islamic history in Urdu. It is distinctive in its appeal to those interested in exploring the multi-coloured mosaic of Islamic history.

books.title: Tareekh e Shahjahan by Dr. Banarsi Prasad Saxena
books.description: Tareekh e Shahjahan, written by Dr. Banarsi Prasad Saxena. This book tells us about Shah Jehan, a Mughal Emperor. It makes one feel like they are living during the reign of Emperor Shahab Ud Din Shahjahan, who belonged to the famous Mughal dynasty.

books.title: Sahib e Lolak Book by Tariq Ismail Sagar
books.description: Sahib e Lolak book written by Tariq Ismail Sagar. This book contains history and biography of a revered saint, Sultan Muhammad Asghar Ali Shah, whose spiritual journey was deeply rooted in the rich traditions of the famous Bahu family of saints in Jhang.

books.title: Seerat Syeda Tun Nisa by Maulana Zulqarnain Attari
books.description: Seerat Syeda Tun Nisa book, written by Maulana Zulqarnain Attari. It tells the story of Hazrat Fatima (R.A) by heart through the story of her life as the Prophet of Islam’s loving daughter and Maula Ali A.S.’s wife. This richly documented biography portrays a woman whose existence continually motivates other women.

books.title: Dai e Islam by Dr. Muhammad Hamidullah
books.description: Dai e Islam book by Dr. Muhammad Hamidullah. This is one of the highly literary books about the life and teachings of Prophet Muhammad, with special attention to his life, virtues, endeavours, and great battles.

books.title: Ek Diya Jalaye Rakhna Novel by Maha Malik
books.description: Ek Diya Jalaye Rakhna novel by Maha Malik. The talented Pakistani writer Maha Malik is a renowned name in Urdu literature and has gifted us with numerous remarkable novels, some of which have graced our television screens like popular dramas in Pakistan.

books.title: Mera Bakht Novel by the talented Sehar Sajid
books.description: Mera Bakht Novel, written by Sehar Sajid. This novel describes an interesting social romantic love story in Urdu. This beautifully woven narrative combines elements of social intricacies, romance, and a poignant call for societal reform.

books.title: Quaid e Azam Ke Ibtidai 30 Saal by Rizwan Ahmad
books.description: Quaid e Azam Ke Ibtidai 30 Saal by Rizwan Ahmad. This book motivates readers by portraying the early life of Muhammad Ali Jinnah in Urdu language. In addition, it emphasizes his exceptional abilities as well as industriousness, particularly in relation to the last-ditch efforts to contest the Legislative Assembly elections in 1946.

books.title: Kali Dunya Novel by MA Rahat
books.description: Kali Dunya Novel by MA Rahat. This novel contains a collection of three short stories, all rich in social, romantic, and cultural aspects. MA Rahat combines these stories to create exemplary practice.

books.title: Justuju Ka Safar Novel by Zeeshan Ul Hassan Usmani
books.description: Justuju Ka Safar Novel by Zeeshan Ul Hassan Usmani. This novel describes an interesting story of ambition, struggle, and romance in Urdu. It is rooted in Sindh, Pakistan, where we follow the growth of a young boy as he walks the remarkable journey of success through dedication and hard work.

books.title: Daldal Novel by Aslam Rahi M.A
books.description: Daldal Novel by Aslam Rahi M.A. The story of this novel is filled with social components and love but is strikingly different from the author’s historical works. In his works that are known to every one of us about Muslim History, Aslam Rahi MA comes up with a different outlook portraying a story which, for now, is not in the past.

books.title: Common Sense by Shah Muhammad Marri
books.description: Common Sense Novel by Shah Muhammad Marri. This novel contains a transformative translation of a renowned English work authored by Thomas Paine and skillfully translated by Shah Muhammad Marri. Both the power of visions and the perseverance of the human spirit are elucidated in this piece of work.

books.title: Mujhe Roothne Na Dena Novel By Nighat Abdullah
books.description: Mujhe Roothne Na Dena Novel, written By Nighat Abdullah. This novel describes an engaging social, romantic and ethical reforming story in Urdu. The novel is evidence of Nighat’s extraordinary narrative skills since it brings together the elements of romance and social issues.

books.title: Saat Samandar Paar Hai Mera Dil by Nasir Hussain
books.description: Saat Samandar Paar Hai Mera Dil by Nasir Hussain . This novel is a touching love story that showcases people’s will to endure hardship in the face of love. Readers are taken to the world of this beautiful story, in which love has no limits, and human beings have the strongest will of all.

books.title: December Laut Ana Tum Novel by Nasir Hussain
books.description: December Laut Ana Tum is a Novel by Nasir Hussain. This novel describes an interesting social, romantic, and moral reforming love story in Urdu. Hussain builds a narrative that spans the complex textures of love and hatred, optimism and despair, and bravery and timidity.

books.title: Har Dil Pe Likha Ik Naam Hai Novel by Nasir Hussain
books.description: Har Dil Pe Likha Ik Naam Hai Novel, written by Nasir Hussain. This novel describes an extremely captivating love story set in Pakistani society. It evaluates the true essence of love and, more especially, the courage of women in enduring love, especially young girls who have, in one way or another, been less lucky. The story develops in circles of moral decay and changing ideals, introducing great and principled turmoil to the reader.

books.title: Baraf Ke Phool Novel by Nasir Hussain
books.description: Baraf Ke Phool Novel by Nasir Hussain. This novel describes an interesting story that touches on social issues and love. The plot of this novel consists of several episodes, telling the story of a young girl in love with a well-placed man. The writer presents the struggle of the couple as they deal with the complex situation arising from their different socialization.

books.title: Aas Urdu Poetry Book By Bashir Badr
books.description: Aas Urdu Poetry Book By Bashir Badr. In this book, you will find Urdu poems of Bashir Badr. Explore the seemingly endless introspective journey. As a respected literary figure, imparting unsurpassed mastery in the use of words, Bashir Badr has once again constructed an elaborate picture of human emotions and feelings with his pen.

books.title: Mukhtasar Tareekh e Afghanistan – Professor Sahibzada Hameedullah
books.description: Mukhtasar Tareekh e Afghanistan, written by Professor Sahibzada Hameed Ullah. He wrote numerous books with a historical basis, and he did not shy away from conducting in-depth

books.title: Qayamat Ki Akhri Alamatein by Mualana Muhammad Allauddin Qasmi
books.description: Qayamat Ke Akhri Alamatein (The Last Signs of Resurrection), authored by Maulana Muhammad Allauddin Qasmi. In this book, some signs before the establishment of the Day of Judgment are recorded. In which the last sign is the rising of the Sun or the rising of the Earth from the direction of the Qibla. After that, the door of repentance will be closed. A believer will remain a believer, and an unbeliever will remain an unbeliever. So everyone should prepare ahead of time.

books.title: R Programming Aik Taaruf by Sana Rasheed

This book is an insightful guide to R programming and its usage in data science.The present book, which consists of twelve chapters, covers more than enough material to help readers comprehend and execute R programming. This includes the basics of R programming, basic vocabulary, ways of communicating with R, its control constructs, and procedures.

books.title: Yaaram Complete Novel by Sumaira Hameed
books.description: Yaaram Complete Novel by Sumaira Hameed. This novel contains an interesting story of love, friendship, self-exploration, and above all the beautiful mess that is called relationships.

books.title: Hamare Zamane Ki Ghulami by Leo Tolstoy
books.description: Hamare Zamane Ki Ghulami, written by Leo Tolstoy. This book describes the state of slavery in present society and represents the bitter truth of the people who live in a state of slavery physically and mentally. It was published in Urdu in Pakistan by a number of publishers, including Lajpat Rai and Sons, and has been translated into many languages.

books.title: Bahr ul Fasahat by Maulvi Najam-ul-Ghani Khan Najmi Rampuri

books.title: Jang Aur Aman by Leo Tolstoy
books.description: Jang Aur Aman novel authored by Leo Tolstoy is one of the most remarkable novels of the 19th century. The original novel is in Russian-language and it was published in 1869. Since then, it has become popular worldwide due to its translations into various languages.

books.title: Anna Karenina Novel by Leo Tolstoy
books.description: Anna Karenina novel by Leo Tolstoy. The plot of this novel depicts the romantic relationship of an upper-class married woman with the military officer Count Vronsky. The sub-narratives of the characters examine love, societal issues, family, and ethics.

books.title: Bayaz e Sehar novel by Begum Sheikh Turab Ali
books.description: Bayaz e Sehar novel authored by Begum Sheikh Turab Ali. books.title: Adamkhor Insan Novel by Shahid Jameel
